settings.content_html:
Partner with Us

Join our exclusive trade program and gain access to wholesale pricing, early product releases, and priority support.

Apply Now

settings.content_liquid:
Trade & Wholesale

B2B Accounts — Lighting Components & Bulk Supply

Ledsone provides trade customers with volume pricing, priority dispatch and dedicated account support for LED transformers, vintage cables, lamp holders and lighting components across the UK & EU.

Apply for B2B Access Contact Trade Support
Approval time: Usually 24–48 hours
Need it faster? Email sales@ledsone.co.uk.
What you get as a trade customer
  • Exclusive trade pricing & volume discounts
  • Priority allocation on core stock
  • Project quotes for bulk or bespoke orders
  • Dedicated trade account manager
Start Application

Why trade with Ledsone

  • Competitive pricing tailored to volume
  • UK-based stock with fast dispatch
  • Reliable lighting components — E27/E14 holders, drivers & cables
  • Support for monthly supply or large projects

Wholesale product categories

LED Transformers
Dimmable & non-dimmable drivers
Vintage Fabric Cables
Bulk rolls & pendant sets
Lamp Holders
E27, E14, B22 + accessories
Accessories & Guards
Cages, roses, fittings

How to request a B2B account

  1. Click Apply for B2B Access or fill the form below.
  2. Provide company details, VAT (if any), and estimated order volume.
  3. We verify and activate trade access within 24–48 hours.
Open Wholesale Request Form Email Trade Support

FAQ

Who can apply?
Contractors, resellers, designers and project buyers.
What documents do you need?
Business email, company name, VAT (if any), website/social proof.
How fast is approval?
Typically 24–48 hours.
Ledsone — Trade enquiries: sales@ledsone.co.uk

settings.content_liquid:
Bulk Purchase Offer

Planning a large project or stocking up for your business? Enjoy exclusive savings when you buy in bulk.

  • 15% OFF your full order
  • Minimum purchase: £500.00
  • Ideal for retailers, interior designers, electricians, and contractors
  • Mix & match products across our store

Get premium lighting and accessories at the best price—perfect for reselling or large installations.

Loyalty Offers

We appreciate your continued support, and we want to give something back!

  • 10% OFF for loyal customers
  • Unlocks after your 5th completed order
  • Newsletter subscribers only
  • Valid on selective products only

Your loyalty matters to us—enjoy exclusive savings every time you shop.
